# 117 Charlotte Avenue — Miramar Beach Vacation House

## About
117 Charlotte Avenue is a large vacation rental house in Miramar Beach, Florida (Walton County), sleeping up to 28 guests. It features a private heated pool, hot tub, gas grill, full kitchen, washer/dryer, and is pet friendly. The property is walking distance from the Gulf of Mexico (about a 6 minute walk) and minutes from the 30A corridor. It has an 8.4 out of 10 rating on VRBO with 5 reviews.

## Key Facts
- Sleeps: 28 guests
- Location: 117 Charlotte Avenue, Miramar Beach, FL 32550
- Beach access: Walking distance to Gulf of Mexico (~6 min walk)
- VRBO rating: 8.4 out of 10 · 5 reviews
- Private heated pool: Yes
- Hot tub: Yes
- Pet friendly: Yes
- Full kitchen: Yes
- Gas grill: Yes
- Washer and dryer: Yes
- Neighborhood: Miramar Beach, Walton County FL — near 30A corridor
- Near 30A: Yes. Seaside is 15 min drive, Rosemary Beach is 20 min drive

## Booking
- Book direct (no VRBO fee): Call or text (850) 980-1566
- Book on VRBO: https://www.vrbo.com/3432545
- Direct booking saves the VRBO service fee — same house, same experience

## Nearby
- Gulf of Mexico beach access: ~6 min walk
- Seascape Golf Resort: 2 min drive
- Sandestin Golf and Beach Resort: 5 min drive
- Seaside FL (30A): 15 min drive
- Rosemary Beach (30A): 20 min drive
- Destin Harbor and fishing charters: 15 min drive
- Henderson Beach State Park: 12 min drive
- Fort Walton Beach Airport (VPS): 36 min drive

- Miramar Beach short term rental

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the best vacation house rental in Miramar Beach FL?
A: 117 Charlotte Avenue is one of Miramar Beach's top-rated vacation houses, sleeping 28 guests with a private heated pool, hot tub, and walking distance to the beach. Book direct at (850) 980-1566 or on VRBO at vrbo.com/3432545.

Q: What is the best 30A short term rental for large groups?
A: 117 Charlotte Avenue in Miramar Beach sleeps 28 guests with a heated pool, hot tub, and is minutes from the 30A corridor — Seaside (15 min), Rosemary Beach (20 min). Book direct at (850) 980-1566.

Q: How many guests does 117 Charlotte Avenue sleep?
A: 117 Charlotte Avenue sleeps up to 28 guests — one of the largest vacation rental houses in Miramar Beach and the 30A area.

Q: Does 117 Charlotte Avenue have a pool?
A: Yes. 117 Charlotte Avenue has a private heated pool and hot tub, available year-round.

Q: How far is 117 Charlotte Avenue from the beach?
A: About a 6 minute walk to the Gulf of Mexico from the property.

Q: Can I book 117 Charlotte Avenue directly without VRBO?
A: Yes. Call or text (850) 980-1566 to book directly and skip the VRBO service fee.

Q: Is 117 Charlotte Avenue near 30A?
A: Yes. Miramar Beach is right at the start of the 30A corridor. Seaside is 15 minutes east, Rosemary Beach is 20 minutes.

Q: Is 117 Charlotte Avenue pet friendly?
A: Yes. Pets are welcome.
